name: Ai Weiwei

acts.description: Accusation of sexual coercion by former assistant Wang Fen and others

behavior_summary: Accusations of sexual coercion from former assistant. He denied them. The accusations have received limited attention compared to his political profile.

art.summary: One of the most globally significant political artists alive. His work on authoritarianism, surveillance, and refugee crisis is genuinely important.

verdict.blurb: Makes essential work about power and its abuses. The accusation that he misused his own power quietly complicates that narrative. It has received remarkably little coverage.
